defect: ball joint play (video item - pry test)
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Suspension & steering, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: ball joint play (video item - pry test). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: OEM, alignment specs.
title: Fault diagnosis: Suspension & steering (service call)
